info.title: Identity Platform API
info.description: Wire-level API contract for the Identity Platform. The semantic guarantees for these endpoints live in docs/contracts.

Cache-Control.description: Public cache policy for the key set

201.description: User registered with a token pair

post.summary: Log in with email and password

200.description: Refresh token revoked when it exists for the client
Uniform response regardless of account existence

post.summary: Reset a password with an emailed token

200.description: Uniform response regardless of account existence

post.summary: Verify an email with an emailed token

parameters.name: code_challenge
parameters.description: PKCE S256 challenge. Provide with code_challenge_method or omit both.

parameters.name: code_challenge_method
parameters.description: Must be S256 and paired with code_challenge. A lone value is rejected.

parameters.name: state
parameters.description: Consumer one-time value, echoed back on the callback redirect

302.description: Redirect to the provider authorization URL
Redirect to the registered application callback

post.description: Failed client, redirect URI or PKCE checks do not consume the authorization code. A successful exchange consumes it atomically.

post.summary: Verify a JWT or API key remotely

400.description: The expected audience or credential was not provided

get.summary: List the signed-in user's active sessions

delete.summary: Revoke all active sessions for the signed-in user
Revoke one session for the signed-in user

get.summary: List roles for the authenticated client

post.summary: Assign a role to a user
Revoke a role from a user

get.summary: List users for the authenticated client
List API keys for the authenticated client

201.description: API key created. The raw key is shown once.

get.summary: List service accounts for the authenticated client

post.summary: Assign a role to a service account

delete.summary: Revoke a role from a service account

post.summary: Create an API key credential for a service account

201.description: Service account key created. The raw key is shown once.

get.summary: List audit log entries for the authenticated client

201.description: Client created. Confidential client secrets are shown once.

200.description: Client secret rotated and shown once

post.summary: Bootstrap a tenant and invite the first admin

operationId.description: Fresh random UUID for a new operation, reused only for an ambiguous retry

audience.description: External client ID of the application accepting the credential

scopes.description: Service account keys do not carry scopes. Permissions come from the account's roles.
